title: FHIR Project Workspace
description: The FHIR Project Workspace ingests FHIR R4 bundles or NDJSON feeds and transforms them to OMOP CDM. Connect a FHIR server, select a patient population, and run the FHIR-to-CDM pipeline.
tips: FHIR connections are configured in Admin → FHIR Connections before they appear here.
Start with a small patient cohort to validate the mapping before ingesting the full population.
The sandbox mode lets you preview mapped records without writing to the CDM.
FHIR R4 is fully supported; DSTU2/STU3 resources are partially mapped — check the mapping log.
Re-run the pipeline after FHIR connection credentials change — old jobs use cached credentials.
